title: sphagneticola gracilis
intro: Sphagneticola gracilis, also known as Wedelia or Butterfly Blue, is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sphagneticola gracilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Sphagneticola gracilis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
